name: LLM Schematic Analyser
description: Inspect your schematic with an LLM and get design improvement suggestions.
description_full:
This plugin lets you inspect your KiCad schematic or PCB with a large language model. It supports cloud models (Claude, GPT-4) and local models via Ollama.

Original: jasiek/kicad-llm-plugin. Updated for KiCad 10 by northstarcomp. MIT License.
